title: Admin Login Success
description: Verify that an admin user can successfully log in with valid credentials.

steps.description: Navigate to the login page.
Enter valid admin username and password.
Click the login button.
Verify that the admin dashboard is displayed with correct user role access.

title: Role-based Access Control Enforcement
description: Ensure that users cannot access unauthorized pages or features based on their assigned role.

steps.description: Login as a teacher (Guru).
Attempt to access the Admin dashboard URL directly.
Verify access is denied or redirected appropriately.
Attempt to access financial management pages.
Verify teacher user cannot access financial modules.

title: Student Management CRUD
description: Verify Admin can create, read, update, and delete student (Santri) records with proper validations.

steps.description: Login as Admin and navigate to the Santri management page.
Create a new student with valid data.
Confirm student appears in the list with correct details.
Edit the student's details and save.
Verify the updated details are reflected.
Delete the student record.
Confirm student is removed from the list.
Attempt to create a student with missing required fields.
Verify validation errors are displayed.

title: Teacher Management CRUD
description: Verify Admin can manage teacher (Guru) data including creation, update, and deletion with validations.

steps.description: Login as Admin and navigate to the Guru management page.
Add a new teacher with valid data.
Confirm the teacher appears with correct details.
Modify the teacher’s information and save.
Verify the updated information is saved correctly.
Delete the teacher record.
Ensure the teacher does not appear in the list any longer.
Try adding a teacher with invalid or duplicate data.
Check for appropriate validation messages.

title: Class and Subject Management
description: Validate creation, update, and deletion of classes (Kelas) and subjects (Mapel) with correct assignments.

steps.description: Login as Admin and open Classes management.
Create a new class with name and level.
Confirm the new class is listed with correct details.
Edit the class details and save changes.
Verify updated class information.
Create a subject and assign it to a class.
Verify the subject appears linked to the correct class.
Delete a subject and a class.
Ensure they are removed from listings correctly.

title: Schedule Management Functionality
description: Verify CRUD operations for class schedules integrating teacher and subject data.

steps.description: Login as Admin and navigate to Schedule management.
Create a new schedule entry with class, subject, teacher, and time.
Ensure the schedule is correctly saved and displayed.
Update the schedule timings or associated data.
Check that changes reflect properly.
Attempt to create conflicting schedule entries.
Verify system alerts or prevents schedule conflicts.
Delete a schedule entry.
Confirm the schedule is removed.

title: Grade Management and Visualization
description: Test input, editing, and viewing student grades across categories, including boundary values and invalid inputs.

steps.description: Login as Admin or Teacher and access Grades management.
Input valid grade values for a student.
Confirm grades are stored and visualized correctly.
Edit existing grades.
Verify updates are saved and displayed accurately.
Try entering grades beyond allowed range (e.g., negative or > maximum score).
Check validation and error messages.

title: Attendance Tracking Accuracy
description: Validate attendance marking, updates and report visibility for students and teachers.

steps.description: Access attendance module as Admin.
Mark student attendance for a given date.
Confirm attendance is recorded correctly.
Edit attendance status and save.
Ensure the update is reflected in reports.
Attempt invalid input such as marking attendance for a future date.
Verify input is rejected with proper error handling.

title: CBT Exam Creation and Student Attempt Tracking
description: Ensure Admin can create exams, add questions, and system properly records student attempts and scoring.

steps.description: Login as Admin and create a new CBT exam with metadata.
Add questions to the exam question bank.
Verify questions are associated with the exam.
Login as a student (Santri) and take the exam.
Submit the exam and ensure attempt is recorded.
Confirm the student's score is calculated and stored accurately.
Attempt to retake the exam if limited attempts are enforced.
Verify system prevents or allows retake as per configuration.

title: PPDB Online Admission Form Submission
description: Validate the new student registration form submissions and data handling including mandatory fields and document uploads.

steps.description: Access the PPDB registration form as a prospective student.
Fill in all mandatory student data fields with valid inputs.
Upload required document files (simulate without actual file upload test).
Submit the registration form.
Verify registration is accepted and data saved.
Submit form with missing required data.
Confirm validation errors are presented.

title: Financial Billing and Payment Tracking
description: Test creation of bills, payment entries, status updates, and notification triggers.

steps.description: Login as Admin or Operator and create new billing records.
Assign billing records to students or guardians.
Verify bills reflect correct amounts and statuses.
Record payment against a bill.
Confirm payment updates billing status.
Trigger payment notification emails.
Verify notifications are sent correctly.

title: Announcements Creation and Visibility
description: Check that Announcements can be created, targeted to user groups, and visible in respective portals.

steps.description: Create an announcement targeting Students and Guardians.
Confirm the announcement appears in Santri and Wali portals.
Create an announcement with invalid or missing target groups.
Verify validation error messages.

title: Internal Messaging System
description: Validate sending, receiving, and viewing messages between users within the system.

steps.description: Login as a teacher and send a message to a student.
Verify the message appears in recipient's inbox.
Reply to the message as the student.
Confirm the reply appears in the teacher's inbox.
Attempt to send a message without content.
Check for validation errors preventing empty messages.

title: CMS Content Management
description: Test creation, editing, and deletion of banners, pages, and testimonials for the public website.

steps.description: Login as Admin and create a new banner with an image and link.
Verify banner appears on the landing page.
Add a new content page and save.
Confirm page is accessible publicly with correct content.
Create a testimonial and verify display.
Ensure testimonial appears on appropriate public pages.
Edit and delete CMS content items.
Verify updates and deletions are reflected.

title: Guardian (Wali) Portal Data Accuracy
description: Ensure guardians can view accurate academic progress, attendance, billing, and messaging related to their wards.

steps.description: Login as a Wali user.
Verify access to child's academic grades, attendance reports, and billing statements.
Send a message to a teacher via the Wali portal.
Confirm message is sent and viewable in messaging system.

title: Student (Santri) Portal Functionalities
description: Verify students can view grades, schedules, and take online CBT exams correctly.

steps.description: Login as Santri.
Confirm schedule display is correct and up to date.
Verify grades are displayed correctly.
Attempt to take an active CBT exam and submit answers.
Ensure exam attempt is recorded with correct timing and scoring.

title: Teacher (Guru) Portal Features
description: Test teacher portal access for managing classes, inputting grades, schedules, and using AI RPP generator.

steps.description: Login as Guru.
Verify access to schedule and class management views.
Input and save student grades through the portal.
Confirm grades are saved and visible immediately.
Use the AI RPP Generator to generate a lesson plan with valid inputs.
Verify that the lesson plan is generated without errors.

title: Export and Import Data Functionality
description: Validate the system can export and import data accurately in Excel and PDF formats without corruption.

steps.description: Login as Admin and export student data to Excel.
Download file is intact and data matches current database.
Export grades report to PDF.
PDF file opens with correct formatted data.
Import a valid Excel file of student data.
Verify imported data is accurately reflected in the system.
Attempt to import invalid or corrupted Excel file.
Check that system detects errors and reports them gracefully.

title: Activity Logs Audit
description: Check that all critical user actions such as login, CRUD operations, and sensitive changes are logged with correct user and timestamps.

steps.description: Perform various system actions including login, create, update, and delete entities as admin.
Verify activity log entries capture action type, user ID, timestamp, and entity affected.
Attempt a failed login.
Confirm the failed attempt is logged.

title: Security: Prevention of Unauthorized Data Access
description: Test that the system effectively prevents unauthorized data access, SQL injection, CSRF, and XSS attacks.

steps.description: Attempt SQL injection in form inputs and URL parameters.
Verify the system neutralizes injection attempts without data compromise.
Perform cross-site scripting (XSS) attacks in input fields.
Confirm inputs are sanitized and no scripts execute.
Try CSRF attack by submitting forms without valid tokens.
Verify the request is rejected.

title: Performance and Pagination
description: Validate data loading performance with large datasets and proper pagination in listings.

steps.description: Populate the student and teacher databases with a large number of records.
Access listings for Santri and Guru management pages.
Verify the page loads quickly and pagination controls function correctly.
Scroll through pages to different data sets.
Ensure data for each page loads properly and UI remains responsive.

title: PWA Offline Availability and Asset Caching
description: Test the Progressive Web App functions including offline access and asset caching on supported browsers.

steps.description: Navigate to the application and confirm online asset caching is triggered.
Verify that core assets are cached as intended.
Simulate offline mode in a supported browser.
Access cached pages such as dashboard and schedules.
Check pages load properly without internet connection.
Perform navigation between cached pages offline.
Ensure smooth navigation and no failure errors.

title: Public Landing Page and PPDB Form Accessibility
description: Verify the public school landing page loads correctly and PPDB admission forms are accessible and submit data properly.

steps.description: Access the public landing page as a non-logged-in user.
Confirm correct loading of page content including banners and testimonials.
Navigate to the PPDB registration form from the landing page.
Verify form loads and all fields are visible.
Submit a valid admission registration.
Confirm successful form submission and response message.

title: Site-wide Settings Configuration
description: Test admin ability to update institutional information and preferences and confirm settings persist correctly.

steps.description: Login as Admin and access Site Settings panel.
Update fields such as school name, contact information, and preferences.
Verify changes save correctly and persist after logout and login.
Attempt to enter invalid data or leave required fields blank.
Confirm validation errors appear and prevent save.
